# Copilot Instructions

## Project
Rust 2024 edition. Roguelike clone based on the original C source in `original/`.

## Consistency
- Keep help pages aligned with game modifications.
- Maintain an updated file CONSISTENCY.md listing the main differences between the original version and this one, to facilitate work for those who want to contribute to the project.

## Project structure
- Separate the application logic into modules
- Each module should be composed of multiple files, each with a specific responsibility
